title: Airwallex invests $1 billion in EMEA expansion
snippet: Airwallex, the leading global payments and financial platform for modern businesses, is investing over $1 billion US dollars ($1.135bn) in the UK and Europe, Middle East and Africa (EMEA) to drive expansion across the region by 2030.

title: Tether launches USAT stablecoin, expands U.S. market focus while seeking $500 billion valuation
message_html: Tether launches USAT stablecoin, expands U.S. market focus while seeking $500 billion valuation ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): Bloomberg: Tether is expanding its focus on the U.S. market and has launched a new stablecoin, USAT, while seeking fundraising that could value the company at around $500 billion, according to CEO Paolo Ardoino.
